_comment: Illustrative only - test in Audit mode before Deny. Azure Policy denying inbound NSG Allow rules from the internet to management ports. Mirrors the module's iac/deny-public-management-exposure.json; kept here as the canonical prevention control for the security-engineering layer.

properties.displayName: Deny public inbound on management ports (22/3389/5985/5986)
properties.description: Denies creation or update of NSG security rules that allow inbound traffic from the internet to SSH, RDP or WinRM management ports.

metadata.description: Start as Audit, then tighten to Deny.
